A

AbstractChartsPanel - Class in app.gui.views
An abstract base panel responsible for managing and displaying a collection of graphical charts.
AbstractChartsPanel() - Constructor for class app.gui.views.AbstractChartsPanel
Constructs an AbstractChartsPanel instance, initializing the dynamic chart container and anchoring it to the center of the layout region.
AnomaliesDetectionService<T> - Interface in app.service
Service interface defining operations for training anomaly detection models and evaluating datasets to identify abnormal financial records.
AnomaliesDetectionServiceFactory - Class in app.service
Factory class responsible for configuring, validating, and instantiating concrete implementations of the AnomaliesDetectionService.
AnomaliesDetectionServiceFactory() - Constructor for class app.service.AnomaliesDetectionServiceFactory
 
AnomalyDetectionException - Exception Class in app.exception
Thrown to indicate that an error occurred during the training, processing, or execution of the anomaly detection algorithms.
AnomalyDetectionException(String) - Constructor for exception class app.exception.AnomalyDetectionException
Constructs a new AnomalyDetectionException with the specified detail message.
AnomalyDetectionException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class app.exception.AnomalyDetectionException
Constructs a new AnomalyDetectionException with the specified detail message and the underlying cause.
AnomalyResult<T> - Class in app.model
Represents the structured result of an anomaly detection evaluation on a specific financial data row.
AnomalyResult(T, double, Map<String, Double>) - Constructor for class app.model.AnomalyResult
Constructs a fully initialized AnomalyResult entity.
ApiClient - Class in app.client
Centralized HTTP client responsible for managing and sending API requests within the application.
ApiClientException - Exception Class in app.exception
 
ApiClientException(String) - Constructor for exception class app.exception.ApiClientException
 
ApiException - Exception Class in app.exception
Thrown to indicate that a remote API server processed a request but returned an unsuccessful response or error status code (typically >= 400).
ApiException(String) - Constructor for exception class app.exception.ApiException
Constructs a new ApiRequestException with the specified detail message.
ApiServerException - Exception Class in app.exception
 
ApiServerException(String) - Constructor for exception class app.exception.ApiServerException

AppColors - Class in app.gui.style
A central style registry defining the consistent color palette used across the application user interface.
AppColors() - Constructor for class app.gui.style.AppColors
 
AppState - Class in app.model
Holds the centralized operational runtime state of the application.
AtrCalculator(int) - Constructor for class app.service.impl.indicators.IndicatorsServiceImpl.AtrCalculator
Initializes the volatility processing framework with window constraint definitions.
ATRPeriod - Variable in class app.model.FinancialIndicatorsPeriods
The period interval configuration for ATR (Average True Range) calculations.
